title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Car Rental Pickup Delays Signals Travel Disruption
thesis: A sudden rise in searches related to car rental pickup delays indicates travel disruption and potential consumer frustration. Travel disruption tends to reduce discretionary travel spending impacting consumer discretionary sector ETFs.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly car rental pickup delay searches
signal_logic: Entry when weekly Google Trends car rental delay search index rises 20% above 4-week average
entry_exit: Entry: Entry when weekly Google Trends car rental delay search index rises 20% above 4-week average Exit: Exit when index returns within 5% of 4-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly car rental pickup delay searches via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel disruptions and rental delays frequently spike seasonally or due to weather/events.

schema.idea: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Car Rental Pickup Delays Signals Travel Disruption

data.source: Google Trends weekly car rental pickup delay searches

schema.behavior: A sudden rise in searches related to car rental pickup delays indicates travel disruption and potential consumer frustration.

market_impact.rationale: Travel disruption tends to reduce discretionary travel spending impacting consumer discretionary sector ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Entry when weekly Google Trends car rental delay search index rises 20% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when index returns within 5% of 4-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel disruptions and rental delays frequently spike seasonally or due to weather/events.

title: Daily Surge In Fred Series Producer Price Index For Steel Signals Industrial Cost Pressure
thesis: A sharp increase in steel producer prices signals rising input costs for industrial producers. Rising steel prices increase costs and compress margins for industrial companies.
signal_logic: Enter short when weekly steel PPI increases 1.5% week-over-week
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short when weekly steel PPI increases 1.5% week-over-week Exit: Exit when weekly PPI growth slows below 0.5% week-over-week
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use FRED PPI Steel weekly data via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Steel price fluctuations occur regularly with supply/demand shifts and tariff news.

schema.idea: Daily Surge In FRED Series Producer Price Index For Steel Signals Industrial Cost Pressure
schema.behavior: A sharp increase in steel producer prices signals rising input costs for industrial producers.

market_impact.rationale: Rising steel prices increase costs and compress margins for industrial companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when weekly steel PPI increases 1.5% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit when weekly PPI growth slows below 0.5% week-over-week

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Steel price fluctuations occur regularly with supply/demand shifts and tariff news.

title: Daily Spike In Usgs Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Freight Disruption Risk
thesis: Increased earthquake frequency near major ports can disrupt freight logistics and supply chains. Logistics disruptions reduce industrial and manufacturing output, hurting industrial sector ETFs.
data_sources: USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports
signal_logic: Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events Exit: Exit when daily count falls back below 2 events
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake swarms and aftershocks near ports regularly occur and can create short-term disruption risk.

schema.idea: Daily Spike In USGS Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Freight Disruption Risk

data.source: USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports

schema.behavior: Increased earthquake frequency near major ports can disrupt freight logistics and supply chains.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics disruptions reduce industrial and manufacturing output, hurting industrial sector ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events
trade_logic.exit: Exit when daily count falls back below 2 events

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake swarms and aftershocks near ports regularly occur and can create short-term disruption risk.
